about: Family-owned landscaping company dedicated to creating beautiful, sustainable outdoor spaces since 2008.
heroSubtitle: We transform ordinary outdoor spaces into extraordinary living environments — designed to thrive season after season.

services.title: Lawn Maintenance
services.desc: Consistent, expert lawn care that keeps your property looking sharp all year long.

services.title: Landscape Design & Installation
services.desc: Custom landscape plans that bring your vision to life — from concept sketches to the final planting.

services.title: Hardscaping
services.desc: Patios, retaining walls, walkways, and fire pits built to last — with natural stone and premium materials.

services.title: Irrigation Systems
services.desc: Smart watering systems that save water and keep every zone of your landscape perfectly hydrated.

services.title: Tree & Shrub Care
services.desc: Keep your trees and shrubs healthy, shaped, and safe with professional pruning and treatment.

services.title: Seasonal Cleanup & Mulching
services.desc: Spring and fall cleanup services that prepare your landscape for the season ahead.

testimonials.name: Margaret Holloway
testimonials.text: GreenCraft turned our tired backyard into the most beautiful space on the block. The attention to detail was incredible — every plant placed with purpose.

testimonials.name: David Chen
testimonials.text: From the first consultation to the final walkthrough, the team was professional and creative. Our new patio has become our favorite spot in the house.

testimonials.name: Sarah Whitfield
testimonials.text: We've used their maintenance service for two years and our lawn has never looked better. Reliable, friendly, and they genuinely care about every yard.

portfolio.title: Perennial Garden Pathway
portfolio.desc: A winding stone path through a vibrant mix of ornamental grasses and flowering perennials.

portfolio.title: Corporate Campus Entry
portfolio.desc: Manicured hedges and ornamental trees framing a modern office entrance.

portfolio.title: Evening Fire Pit Patio
portfolio.desc: Custom stone patio with integrated fire pit, seat walls, and landscape lighting.

portfolio.title: Cottage Garden Walk
portfolio.desc: Classic cottage-style garden with roses, lavender, and natural stone stepping stones.

portfolio.title: Terraced Retaining Wall
portfolio.desc: Multi-level natural stone retaining wall with built-in planting pockets.

portfolio.title: Outdoor Kitchen & Pergola
portfolio.desc: Complete outdoor living space with pergola, built-in grill, and stone countertops.

portfolio.title: Full Lawn Restoration
portfolio.desc: From neglected and patchy to thick, healthy turf with professional care.

portfolio.title: Backyard Entertainment Area
portfolio.desc: Bare yard transformed into a stunning patio with dining and lounge areas.

beforeAfter.title: Complete Lawn Revival
beforeAfter.desc: Transformed an overgrown yard into a lush, manicured lawn with colorful garden beds.

beforeAfter.title: Backyard Patio Oasis
beforeAfter.desc: Converted bare soil into a stunning stone patio with fire pit and seating area.

beforeAfter.title: Garden & Water Feature
beforeAfter.desc: Added a stone pathway, native plantings, and a birdbath fountain to a plain lawn.

values.title: Quality First
values.desc: We never cut corners. Every project gets the same care and craftsmanship, whether it's a small garden bed or a full property transformation.

values.title: Clear Communication
values.desc: You'll always know what's happening, when it's happening, and what it costs. No surprises, no hidden fees.

values.title: Sustainable Practices
values.desc: Native plantings, water-smart irrigation, organic treatments — we design landscapes that work with nature, not against it.
